channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: DOJ Acting Secretary Vida prays for guidance on Zaldy Co case during Prague visit
item.description: Habang nasa Prague, Czech Republic, dumalo si Department of Justice Acting Secretary Fredderick Vida sa isang English-language Mass sa Church of Our Lady Victorious, na kilala rin sa mga Pilipino bila...

item.title: Osimhen goal helps Galatasaray defeat Fenerbahce and move closer to league title
item.description: Victor Osimhen show say him still be key man for Galatasaray as he return from break come deliver strong performance for their big Istanbul derby against Fenerbahce. The Nigerian striker score the fir...

item.title: Serengeti Boys face Mali, Angola and Mozambique in U-17 AFCON 2026 group stage
item.description: Tanzania’s U-17 national team, popularly known as the Serengeti Boys, have been drawn into a strong Group C for the TotalEnergies CAF U-17 Africa Cup of Nations Morocco 2026. In this group, they will ...

item.title: TMA warns of two days of heavy rainfall and possible flooding in several regions
item.description: The Tanzania Meteorological Authority (TMA) has issued a weather alert warning that several regions across the country should expect heavy rainfall for two consecutive days starting Monday, April 27, ...

item.title: Online discussions emerge following White House Correspondents’ Dinner shooting incident
item.description: Following the shooting at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner, a wave of conspiracy theories quickly emerged across various social media platforms. On Bluesky, a network popular among left-leaning ...

item.title: Britain's Got Talent and I'm A Celebrity Experience Disruptions Following Separate Incidents
item.description: Two separate incidents have caused disruption to British television programming recently. During the Britain's Got Talent live show, an audience member was reportedly removed by security, leading to b...

item.title: Lisa Kudrow Details Difficult Experiences with 'Friends' Writers' Room
item.description: Lisa Kudrow, beloved for her role as Phoebe Buffay in the iconic sitcom 'Friends,' has shared unsettling details about her experiences during the show's production. In a recent interview, Kudrow revea...

item.title: Trump comments on security, political violence after shooting at White House correspondents’ dinner
item.description: President Donald Trump addressed reporters at the White House the day after a shooting incident at the White House correspondents’ dinner in Washington, describing the world as chaotic and reflecting ...

item.title: US Press Gala Shooting: Details Emerge About Suspect
item.description: A shooting incident occurred at a prestigious press gala in the United States, sparking immediate investigation and drawing widespread attention. Initial reports indicate that a suspect has been ident...

item.title: What You Need to Know About Donating a Kidney to Your Partner in Nigeria
item.description: In relationships, the thought of saving your partner's life by donating your kidney can be both a powerful and overwhelming idea. Kidney failure is a life-threatening condition, and in some cases, a t...

item.title: Clash of Ideologies: Pope Leo Challenges Trump, Resurging Theological Voices Emerge
item.description: A recent conflict between President Trump and Pope Leo has sparked a much-needed theological education for the public, revealing a stark contrast between shallow political rhetoric and the radical, su...

item.title: Police strengthen security measures for Miss Universe Philippines 2026 semi-finals in Northern Mindanao
item.description: Authorities in Northern Mindanao have stepped up security preparations ahead of the Miss Universe Philippines 2026 semi-finals set to take place in Misamis Occidental. According to Maj. Joann Navarro,...

item.title: Maktown Flyers secure strong opening win in BAL as Igoche Mark commends team effort
item.description: Popular basketball promoter Igoche Mark don commend Maktown Flyers after dem record an impressive 76–68 win against JCA Kings for their opening match in the 2026 Basketball Africa League (BAL) Sahara ...

item.title: Reports Suggest Kash Patel May Face Removal Amid Controversies and Internal Concerns
item.description: According to a report citing a senior White House official, FBI Director Kash Patel may soon be removed from his position with President Trump’s approval, following a series of negative media reports ...

item.title: K-9 units locate and rescue missing woman after 200-foot fall in San Bernardino Mountains
item.description: Two trained K-9 units from the San Bernardino County Sheriff’s Department played a critical role in rescuing a missing 49-year-old woman who had fallen approximately 200 feet into a steep ravine in th...

item.title: African Court to hear case on Mali’s alleged use of foreign mercenaries in civilian abuses
item.description: The African Court on Human and Peoples’ Rights (ACtHPR), based in Arusha, is set to hear a significant case against the government of Mali concerning alleged human rights violations linked to foreign ...

item.title: PDP Explains Makinde’s Remarks on Historical Political Violence, Accuses APC of Misinterpretation
item.description: The Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) don come out to defend Oyo State Governor, Seyi Makinde, over wetin e talk about the historical 'Operation Wetie'. According to PDP, the governor's words wey dem cla...

item.title: NYSC Member Killed During Armed Robbery Shootout in Abuja
item.description: The Nigerian Army don confirm say one serving NYSC member, Abdulsamad Jamiu, don lose him life during one gunbattle wey happen for Shagari Estate, Dei Dei, Abuja. According to Lieutenant Olawuyi Oduno...

item.title: Russian Africa Corps alleges foreign-backed coup attempt after coordinated attacks in Mali
item.description: Russia Africa Corps, one Russian paramilitary group, don describe the recent coordinated attacks across Mali as an attempted coup, and dem dey accuse Western intelligence services of supporting the op...

item.title: Ouaddou criticises Kaizer Chiefs’ physical approach after Soweto derby draw
item.description: Orlando Pirates head coach Abdeslam Ouaddou voiced strong criticism of Kaizer Chiefs following a tense 1-1 draw in the Soweto derby at FNB Stadium. Although the result keeps Pirates at the top of the ...
